metadata.description: Agent skills and hooks for development workflows - Git, GitHub, skill authoring, and safety guardrails

plugins.name: github-workflow
plugins.description: Git commit, PR creation, review, and merge skills following Conventional Commits

plugins.name: skill-authoring
plugins.description: Guide for creating Claude Code skills following Anthropic's best practices

plugins.name: guardrails
plugins.description: Safety guardrails for running Claude Code with reduced supervision. Ships the guard-destructive PreToolUse hook: hard-blocks catastrophic Bash commands (rm -rf /, rsync --delete, docker volume rm) and prompts for confirmation on other destructive operations (rm, rmdir, git reset --hard, shred, dd, mkfs). Exempts rm whose operands all sit under a temp directory.
